title: Registration of Early-Maturing Peanut Germplasm ICGV 92196, ICGV 92206, ICGV 92234, and ICGV 92243
abstract:
Improved Spanish peanut (Arachis hypogaea L. subsp. fastigiata
var. vulgaris) germplasm lines ICGV 92196 (Reg. no. GP-92, PI
599344), ICGV 92206 (Reg. no. GP-93, PI 599345), ICGV 92234
(Reg. no. GP-94, PI 599346), and ICGV 92243 (Reg. no. GP-95,
PI 599347) were bred at the International Crops Research Institute
for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT) Asia Center (IAC), Patancheru,
A.P., India. These four lines were released as earlymaturing,
high-yielding germplasm by the Plant Materials Identification
Committee of ICRISAT in 1996.
